commits.message: feat: Improve save menu UX and theme token usage
fix: Manual saves not appearing in UI due to stale cache
fix: Prevent duplicate newspaper articles - show each article only once
fix: Move save timestamp to same line as action buttons
fix: Reinstall dependencies to resolve i18next import error
fix: Increase save loading timeout and add fallback
fix: improve save name display with center ellipsis
feat: broadcast-ready loading states and critical socket isolation fix
fix: newspaper template variables and save isolation
feat: add automatic save-on-exit to prevent data loss
feat: improve autosave UX with visual feedback
perf: optimize autosave and building collision detection
fix: Prevent autosave during pause and reduce console spam
fix: TypeScript errors in collapsible filters and settings
feat: collapsible filters, cheat sheet fixes, env var cleanup
